name: type:bug
description: Something is broken or behaving incorrectly (Work Type: Bug)

name: type:feature
description: New capability or enhancement (Work Type: Feature)

name: type:design
description: UX/UI or interaction design work (Work Type: Design)

name: type:chore
description: Tooling, deps, or maintenance with no product impact (Work Type: Chore)

name: type:tech-debt
description: Known shortcut to repay; reduces future friction (Work Type: Tech Debt)

name: type:security
description: Vulnerability, hardening, or security-sensitive change (Work Type: Security)

name: priority:P1
description: High: schedule into the current iteration

name: priority:P3
description: Low: nice-to-have, do when capacity allows

name: blocked
description: Cannot progress; waiting on a dependency or external factor

name: good-first-issue
description: Well-scoped and approachable for a first-time contributor

name: needs-triage
description: Not yet assessed; awaiting Service/Type/Priority classification

name: area:api
description: Component: HTTP/gRPC API surface, controllers, DTOs, contracts

name: area:data
description: Component: persistence, migrations, projections, data model
